
---
title: "Data Science"
engine: jupyter 
kernel: Math_lab
---

```{julia}
import Pkg
```

```{julia}
using Statistics
x = [1.0, 2.2, 3.5, 4.8, 5.1]
mean(x)
```

```{r}
x <- c(1.0, 2.2, 3.5, 4.8, 5.1)
mean(x)
```

```{python}
import math
import networkx
print(f"Square root of 144 is {math.sqrt(144)}")
```
